positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a whimsical forest animal guide, possibly a fox or raven, illuminated by glowing bioluminescent flora. The scene should use a high-contrast palette of deep indigo and emerald green, accented by warm pops of gold and magenta. The art style should be inspired by modern magical realism illustration, with strong graphic silhouettes and clean linework, suitable for repeat printing on fabric. Focus on dynamic negative space and intricate leaf vein details. Minimalist yet highly detailed composition, perfectly framed for a square apparel print.
